compiled_state.title: RED tests for sprint-manual-drain.sh (behavioral test suite)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Implementation Notes
Create tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh with the following test functions. All tests MUST fail (RED) before Task 6 is implemented because the script does not exist yet.

Mock seam: set DSO_MANUAL_INPUT to simulate user input without a live terminal. DSO_MANUAL_INPUT is read by the script instead of stdin when set.

Use an isolated mock ticket store (TICKET_STORE env var pointing to a temp directory) so tests do not touch the real .tickets-tracker/.

Tests to create:

1. test_drain_done_runs_verification_command_exit_0_proceeds
   Given: manual story with verification_command="exit 0", DSO_MANUAL_INPUT="done"
   Then: script exits 0, sentinel comment written with verification_command_exit_code=0

2. test_drain_done_re_prompts_on_verification_command_fail
   Given: manual story with verification_command="exit 1", first done input
   Then: exits 2 (re-prompt), output contains failure text

3. test_drain_done_re_prompts_on_timeout
   Given: manual story with verification_command="sleep 9999", DSO_MANUAL_INPUT="done"
   Then: script exits 2 within timeout+1 seconds, output contains "timeout"

4. test_drain_dangerous_pattern_rejected
   Given: manual story with verification_command containing "rm -rf", DSO_MANUAL_INPUT="done"
   Then: exits 2, output contains "dangerous pattern"

5. test_drain_oversize_command_rejected
   Given: verification_command of 501+ chars, DSO_MANUAL_INPUT="done"
   Then: exits 2, output contains "exceeds length limit"

6. test_drain_skip_exits_1
   Given: DSO_MANUAL_INPUT="skip"
   Then: exits 1, sentinel has handshake_outcome=skip

7. test_drain_done_story_id_targets_specific_story
   Given: two manual stories A and B, DSO_MANUAL_INPUT="done A-id"
   Then: story A gets sentinel, story B deferred

8. test_drain_confirmation_token_audit_comment
   Given: no verification_command, DSO_MANUAL_INPUT=done+token
   Then: ticket comment contains token, sentinel has user_input=token

9. test_drain_sentinel_written_format_valid
   Given: story passes handshake
   Then: comment starts with "MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL: " and JSON is parseable with all required fields

10. test_drain_topo_sort_manual_stories_order_preserved
    Given: ordered story list [M1, M2], DSO_MANUAL_INPUT="done\ndone"
    Then: M1 prompt shown before M2 prompt in output

11. test_drain_cycle_detected_diagnostic
    Given: story list with mutual dependency between M1 and M2
    Then: output contains "CYCLE_DETECTED" naming both participants, exits non-zero

## TDD: .test-index RED marker
Add to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-manual-drain.sh: tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh [test_drain_done_runs_verification_command_exit_0_proceeds]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) after Task 6 is implemented
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh
- [ ] All 11 test functions present in test file
  Verify: grep -c "^test_drain_\|^function test_drain_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 11)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present for sprint-manual-drain.sh
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_drain_done_runs_verification_command_exit_0_proceeds\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests use DSO_MANUAL_INPUT env var for mock seam
  Verify: grep -q "DSO_MANUAL_INPUT" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh
- [ ] Tests use isolated TICKET_STORE
  Verify: grep -q "TICKET_STORE" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-manual-drain.sh
